summary: Phase 4 Community & Credential testing complete. All 21 backend tests pass. Frontend: AdminCommunityPage, AnnouncementsFeed, LessonQA, and VideoLessonWorkbench all verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created test user phase4-user-1774441366922 with cohort access (user_access collection), MOD-6 review approved (registry_id generated), and MOD-1 approved for VideoLessonWorkbench testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 fully tested. All endpoints for lesson-viewed, lesson-progress, registry-id, portal QA, portal announcements, admin QA, admin announcements (CRUD+toggle), and registry ID generation on MOD-6 approval are working. Frontend: AdminCommunityPage at /admin/community has Announcements and Q&A tabs both working. Portal shows AnnouncementsFeed for paid users. VideoLessonWorkbench renders LessonQA component below lesson content. NOTE: cohort_access collection is not used for hasCohortAccess check; the correct collection is user_access with fields has_access:true and access_level:'cohort'.

test_results.GET /portal/registry-id: PASS - returns {issued:false} with no MOD-6 approval
test_results.MOD-6 registry ID generation: PASS - registry_id created in DB and API returns issued:true
test_results.AdminCommunityPage /admin/community: PASS - loads with Announcements and Q&A tabs
test_results.AdminCommunityPage create announcement: PASS - announcement created, shows in list
test_results.AdminCommunityPage Q&A tab: PASS - shows questions with reply input
test_results.Portal AnnouncementsFeed: PASS - visible for paid cohort users
